hero.badge: Actively seeking Physiotherapy Internship / Job Opportunities

about.subtitle: Aspiring Physiotherapy Professional
about.title: Passionate about Rehabilitation & Patient Care
about.description: I am Dr. Shyam Kumar, a dedicated physiotherapist focusing on neuro-rehabilitation, orthopedic care, and sports injuries. I am eager to apply my academic knowledge and clinical skills to provide excellent patient care and grow professionally within a reputable hospital or clinic.

services.title: Clinical Skills & Expertise
services.description: Proficient in evidence-based assessments and practical implementation of various physiotherapy modalities to ensure optimal patient recovery.

doctors.subtitle: My Journey
doctors.title: Professional Profile
doctors.description: A continuously learning professional dedicated to evidence-based practice and empathetic patient care.
doctors.name: Dr. Shyam Kumar
doctors.point1: Strong foundation in human anatomy and biomechanics
doctors.point2: Excellent communication and patient management skills
doctors.point3: Committed to ongoing professional development and learning
doctors.homeVisitNote: Willing to relocate for the right professional opportunity

faq.title: Education & Background
faq.description: My academic journey, career objectives, and professional qualifications.
faq.a1: I hold a degree in Physiotherapy, equipping me with comprehensive knowledge of rehabilitation science, human anatomy, and clinical assessment.
faq.a2: Yes, I am completely open to relocating for the right full-time opportunity or internship that offers valuable clinical exposure and professional growth.
faq.q3: What kind of roles are you looking for?
faq.a3: I am actively looking for full-time junior therapist roles, clinical internships, and sports physio opportunities where I can utilize my skills to help patients recover.
faq.q4: Are you registered with a professional council?
faq.a4: Yes, I am committed to ethical clinical practices and maintain all necessary professional registrations and continuous education requirements.

footer.title: Dr. Shyam Kumar
footer.description: A dedicated physiotherapy professional seeking full-time roles and internships to contribute to patient healing and rehabilitation.

resume.subtitle: My Qualifications
resume.title: Resume & Experience
resume.cert1Org: Jay Prabha Medanta Super Specialty Hospital

testimonials.title: Clinical Rotations & Exposure
testimonials.description: Practical experience gained during various hospital postings, clinical rotations, and academic projects.

rev1.name: Orthopedics Department
rev1.comment: Assisted in the rehabilitation of post-operative orthopedic patients, focusing on early mobilization, joint strengthening, and pain management strategies.

rev2.name: Neurology Ward
rev2.comment: Gained hands-on experience in stroke rehabilitation, helping patients regain mobility and motor control through targeted neuro-facilitation techniques.

rev3.name: Outpatient Clinic (OPD)
rev3.comment: Conducted detailed patient assessments for musculoskeletal disorders and designed personalized home exercise programs for rapid recovery.

rev4.name: Sports Rehabilitation Camp
rev4.comment: Provided on-field assessment, taping, and immediate injury management for athletes during local sports tournaments.
